---
title: "Presentation Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle"
author: "Author Name"
date: today
format: tue-revealjs
tue-cover-image: assets/tue-bg-img1.jpg
tue-cover-logo: assets/tue-logo-white.png
# Red bar opacity (0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque)
tue-cover-bar-opacity: 0.65
# Slide background colour — used for normal slides and the bottom footer strip of the cover slide
tue-slide-bg: "#f3efef"
# Content slide text padding (top/bottom left/right), e.g. "30px 58px"
tue-content-slide-padding: "30px 58px"
# Short title shown on the left of the footer bar on every content slide
tue-short-title: "Short Title — TU/e"
# Logo shown on the right of the footer bar (defaults to TU/e scarlet logo)
tue-footer-logo: "assets/tue-logo-wide-scarlet-alpha.png"
---

## Introduction

- Replace this slide with your own content.
- See `presentation.qmd` for a full showcase of available slide layouts.

## Two Columns

:::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Left

- Point one
- Point two
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Right

- Point A
- Point B
:::
::::

## Conclusion

- Key takeaway one
- Key takeaway two
